results.name: Ukraine
results.key_finding: Attribution screen. July civilian toll (286 killed/1,388 injured, highest since 2023) and the Jul 1-2 Kyiv strike are RUSSIA's conduct, scored against Russia (0.0). Ukraine's metro sheltering of 52,500 is band-consistent civilian protection. Confirm 50.0.

results.name: Venezuela
results.key_finding: Exogenous-disaster screen. Day-9 quake toll (official 2,595; pathologist alleges under a third of actual; 50,000 unaccounted) reflects scale/disclosure, not new government harm. Media-blocking is chronic/already-priced; single-source undercount claim is a forward trigger, sub-threshold. Aid acceptance blocks downgrade. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: China
results.key_finding: Double-count + forward-trigger. Ethnic Unity Law (in force Jul 1) codifies already-priced assimilation + Article 63 transnational claim; no documented Day 2-3 enforcement. Germany's concern is third-party. Marginal dock ~-1.5 sub-threshold. Confirm 19.5.

results.name: Lebanon
results.key_finding: Attribution + non-state screen. IDF 'no ceasefire' war harm is Israel's conduct; Hezbollah's rejection is non-state; the unrealized ceasefire is not positive evidence. No new Lebanese-state own conduct. Confirm 17.2.

results.name: Nigeria
results.key_finding: Double-count + non-state. Record 36.2M food insecure / 15,000 Phase 5 Borno continue the already-priced Jun 19 crossing; JNIM attacks are non-state; funding gap is not government obstruction. Formal Phase 5 declaration remains a forward trigger. Confirm 18.0.

results.name: South Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor screen. 7.8M food insecure, 73,300 Phase 5 (up 160%), famine risk in 4 counties reinforce but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Mali
results.key_finding: Non-state + double-count + calibration flag. JNIM Bamako siege is non-state; 5M-in-need / 18.5%-funded figures continue the already-priced crisis. OPEN Sahel-band calibration (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3) routed to coordinator, NOT an assessor one-off. Confirm 12.5. (Rotation-state composite corrected 7.5->12.5 to match published.)

results.name: UnitedHealth Group
results.key_finding: Pre-adjudication. DOJ criminal (now Optum Rx/physician reimbursement) + civil MA-inflation probes are not yet decided in court; Jun 23 takedown is sector context; Grassley 'gaming' finding already priced. Confirm 10.2; forward trigger = indictment/ruling/settlement.

results.name: El Salvador
results.key_finding: PENDING PROPOSAL STANDS - NO DUPLICATE. Today's evidence (indefinite re-election amendment, Cristosal exile, 86 political prisoners, child life-sentences) is the SAME basis already captured in the 2026-07-02 pending downgrade to 15.0 (Developing->Critical, delta -5.3, status pending/unapplied). No materially new evidence; no second proposal emitted. Baseline used = published 20.3 (rotation-state 15.x error already corrected). Confirm published; pending proposal remains operative.

results.name: Sudan
results.key_finding: Floor + non-state. RSF El Obeid offensive (563k + 105k IDPs at risk) and Amnesty's July 2026 El Fasher crimes-against-humanity report are RSF (non-state) conduct; 28.9M food insecure. Reinforces but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Iran
results.key_finding: Near-floor + no-scoring-event. Khamenei state funeral (Jul 4-9) and the paused US-Iran talks are procedural; his Feb 28 assassination was Israel's conduct. No new Iranian own-conduct harm within window. Confirm 2.5.

results.name: Democratic Republic of Congo
results.key_finding: Near-floor + exogenous disease. Ebola across 4 provinces (1,406 cases/438 deaths; Uganda/France/Germany spread) is an exogenous outbreak scored on response; M23 harm attributed to Rwanda-backed forces. Reinforces but cannot meaningfully lower 2.3. Confirm 2.3.

results.name: Burkina Faso
results.key_finding: Non-state + double-count + calibration flag. 9.1M Sahel food insecure and JNIM blockades of ~2M are non-state siege harm continuing the already-priced Jun-1 active-state-perpetration reweight. OPEN Sahel calibration vs Mali is coordinator-level. Confirm 6.3.

results.name: Russia
results.key_finding: Floor + realized-harm correctly attributed here. The record July toll and Kyiv strike are scored against Russia; EU Special Tribunal active; 20,500+ children forcibly deported. Already at 0.0; reinforcing evidence cannot lower the floor. Confirm 0.0.

results.name: Yemen
results.key_finding: Floor + non-state. 18.3M food insecure, 450+ health facilities closed, and 73 UN staff detained by the Houthi de facto authority (non-state). Reinforces but cannot lower an existing 0.0 floor. Confirm 0.0.

el_salvador_handling: Pending 2026-07-02 downgrade proposal (20.3 -> 15.0, Developing->Critical) CONFIRMED to stand. Today's evidence is the same already-captured basis; NO duplicate/second proposal emitted. Baseline used = published 20.3. Pending proposal file unchanged (status pending, unapplied).

false_positives_screened.screened: Record July toll + Kyiv strike are Russia's conduct, scored against Russia (0.0). Harm inflicted BY ANOTHER STATE cannot yield a downgrade; sheltering response is band-consistent. Confirm 50.0.

sahel_calibration_status: OPEN - coordinator-level Sahel-band reweight review carried forward (Mali 12.5 vs Burkina Faso 6.3). Both confirmed at published baselines; no assessor one-off (3e-bis(5)).

math_hygiene.note: No score changes today; all 15 are confirmations at live-index baselines from countries.json/fortune-500.json. El Salvador's operative change is the unchanged 2026-07-02 pending proposal (reconstructs to 15.0). Rotation-state Mali composite corrected 7.5->12.5 to match its published index value (confirm at published, not a proposed value).

rotation_state_integrity: For all 15 entities, rotation-state composite/band/rank reflect PUBLISHED index values; only last_assessed/last_scanned timestamps updated. El Salvador left at published 20.3 with last_change_proposal 2026-07-02 (pending, unapplied). Mali corrected to published 12.5/rank 160.
forward_triggers_logged: Ukraine: documented Ukrainian-state failure to protect / discriminatory relief = downgrade; verified equitable civilian-protection scale-up = upgrade.
Venezuela: independently verified falsification/suppression of death data or deliberate relief obstruction = downgrade; transparent equitable relief scale-up = upgrade.
China: first documented Article 63 extraterritorial enforcement action.
Lebanon: implemented civilian-protecting ceasefire with the state extending governance/relief = upgrade.
Nigeria: formal IPC Phase 5 famine declaration in Borno or documented aid obstruction = downgrade.
South Sudan: verified state-led equitable relief scale-up and civilian protection = upgrade.
Mali/Burkina Faso: state-perpetrated civilian violence or siege expansion = downgrade; aid-access + NGO-space restoration = upgrade.

El Salvador: enforcement of indefinite re-election in 2027, new mass-detention escalation, or further HRD imprisonment = deeper downgrade; due-process restoration / detainee release with repair = upgrade support.
Sudan: verified state-led civilian protection and equitable relief access = upgrade.
Iran: documented new mass-repression/lethal crackdown = downgrade; due-process restoration / prisoner release = upgrade.
DRC: collapse/obstruction of Ebola response = downgrade; verified containment scale-up = upgrade.
Russia: cessation of attacks on civilians, return of deported children, cooperation with accountability = upgrade.
Yemen: restoration of humanitarian access, release of detained UN staff, state-led civilian protection = upgrade.
